author: śrīla saccidānanda bhaktibinoda ṭhākura
verses:
vraja⋅dhāma nityadhana, rādhā⋅kṛṣṇa duijana,
līlāveśe ekatanu hañā
dhāmasaha gauḍadeśe, prakaṭa hoilā ese’,
nija nitya⋅pāriṣada lañā

mana, tumi satya bali’ jāna
navadvīpe gaura⋅hari, nāma⋅saṅkīrtana kari’,
premāmṛta gauḍe kaila dāna

sannyāsera chala kari’, nīlācale sei hari,
śrī⋅kṛṣṇacaitanya jatīśvara
dāmodara, rāmānanda, laye kari’ parānanda,
gūḍhatattva jānāya vistara

raghunāthe sei tattva, śikhāiyā paramārtha,
pāṭhāilā śrī⋅rūpera kāche
śrī⋅dāsagosvāmī vraje, rūpasaha kṛṣṇa⋅bha’je,
‘manaḥśikṣā’⋅śloka likhiyāche

tā̐hāra dāsera dāsa, haite jā’ra baḍa āśa,
e bhaktivinoda akiñcana
‘manaḥśikṣā bhāṣā’ gāya, jathā śuddhabhakta pāya,
dayā kari’ karena śravaṇa
en_translation:
Vraja-dhāma is the eternal wealth, the two persons Rādhā-Kṛṣṇa, Who have become one body absorbed in divine pastimes. Along with their abode, they have appeared in Gauḍa-deśa, Bringing their own eternal associates with them.

O mind, know this as the absolute truth: In Navadvīpa, Gaura⋅hari, performing nāma-saṅkīrtana, Distributed the nectar of prema throughout Gauḍa.

Under the pretext of sannyāsa, that same Hari in Nīlācala, Is Śrī Kṛṣṇa Caitanya, the master of ascetics. Taking Dāmodara and Rāmānanda, feeling supreme bliss, He revealed deep confidential truths in great detail.

Teaching those truths and the ultimate goal to Raghunātha, He sent him to the presence of Śrī Rūpa. Śrī Dāsa Gosvāmī in Vraja, worshipping Kṛṣṇa with Rūpa, Has written the verses of "Manaḥ-śikṣā."

To be the servant of the servant of those whose hope is great, This Bhaktivinoda is most humble and possesses nothing. He sings this "Manaḥ-śikṣā Bhāṣā" wherever pure devotees are found, May they mercifully grant him a hearing.
